prompt: Order these game releases from earliest to latest

events.title: Senet played in Egypt
events.fact: 3000 BC — board game found in predynastic tombs

events.title: Chaturanga in India
events.fact: 600 AD — chess ancestor developed in Gupta Empire

events.title: Landlord's Game patented
events.fact: 1903 — Lizzie Magie designs precursor to Monopoly

events.title: LEGO bricks patented
events.fact: 1949 — automatic binding bricks released in Denmark

events.title: Barbie doll introduced
events.fact: 1959 — debuted by Mattel at American Toy Fair

events.title: Rubik's Cube invented
events.fact: 1974 — Erno Rubik creates 3D puzzle in Hungary

events.title: Pokémon Red and Green
events.fact: 1996 — Game Boy release launches global franchise
